configMismatch.title: Menu Configuration Mismatch
configMismatch.desc: The menu route and configured data table are inconsistent.

menu.name: Menu Name
menu.menuTypeDesc: Menu Type Description 0: Menu, 1: Iframe, 2: External Link, 3: Button
menu.copyStrategyLabel: How to write into target app
menu.copyStrategyMergeDescription: Merge into existing target app menus
menu.copyStrategyReplaceDescription: Replace all target app menus with source menus
menu.copyTargetAppsRequired: Please select at least 1 target app
menu.copyInfo: Copied menus in target apps will receive new IDs to avoid overwriting existing data. Kanban/report/trigger configs are preserved, while CRUD/search data remains isolated per app_id. If you choose "Replace all", current menus in target apps will be fully overwritten.
menu.copyTargetRequired: Please select at least 1 target app different from source app
menu.badge.tabsHint: {{count}} child menus will become tabs in Detail Grid
menu.badge.noTabsHint: Master-Detail has no child menu yet
menu.deleteConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to delete this menu?
menu.kanbanConfigHint: Provide JSON for the standalone board: source table, status field, stages, timeline, and reporting behavior.
menu.kanbanLinkedMenuRequired: Kanban menu requires selecting a related data menu
menu.kanbanStageFieldRequired: Auto progress update requires selecting a stage field
menu.kanbanProgressFieldRequired: Auto progress update requires selecting a progress field (%)
menu.kanbanSelectLinkedMenu: Please select a related data menu
menu.kanbanLinkedMenuNotFound: Selected related data menu was not found
menu.kanbanGeneratedFromLinkedMenu: Kanban config generated from linked data menu
menu.kanbanLinkedDataMenuPlaceholder: Select a menu with related table configuration
menu.kanbanGenerateFromLinkedMenuHint: No hardcoded template. Kanban config is generated directly from the linked data menu table.
menu.kanbanStrictModeHint: Strict mode enforces stage transitions and required fields by stage.
menu.kanbanAutoProgressHint: When enabled: stage changes automatically update progress field (%) and KPI timestamps.
menu.kanbanDoneStagesHint: Enter done stage IDs separated by commas. Example: done,completed
menu.kanbanProgressLinkedMenuRequired: Two-table mode requires selecting a progress-log menu
menu.kanbanProgressTaskRefFieldRequired: Two-table mode requires selecting task reference field in progress table
menu.kanbanProgressGeneratedFromLinkedMenu: Progress log table has been linked
menu.kanbanProgressLinkedMenuPlaceholder: Select menu that stores progress history
menu.kanbanSmartAdviceTaskMenuMissing: Task data menu is not linked yet. Link the task menu so the system can auto-detect fields.
menu.kanbanSmartAdviceProgressMenuMissing: Two-table mode is selected but progress-log menu is not linked yet.
menu.kanbanSmartAdviceTaskFieldsMissing: Task table is missing or not mapped for fields
menu.kanbanSmartAdviceProgressFieldsMissing: Progress table is missing or not mapped for fields
menu.kanbanSmartAutoMappedWithGaps: System auto-mapped partially, but could not find enough fields in progress table:
menu.kanbanAutoFilledFromLinkedMenus: Kanban fields were auto-filled from the linked menus
menu.kanbanAutoCreateButton: Add missing fields to linked menus
menu.kanbanAutoCreateConfirmDesc: The system will add missing fields to the linked source menus and remap Kanban immediately.
menu.kanbanAutoCreateFailed: Unable to add fields to linked menus
menu.kanbanAutoCreateNoMissingFields: There are no missing fields to add
menu.kanbanConfigInvalidJson: Kanban config must be valid JSON
menu.menuNotFoundForUpdate: Menu to update was not found
menu.masterDetailAlertTitle: Note: child menus will not appear in the main menu tree
menu.masterDetailAlertDesc: Child menus of this menu will be rendered as tabs in the Master-Detail Detail Grid and will not appear as separate menu nodes.
menu.dynamicCodeAlertDesc: This menu executes JavaScript from the selected sys_autos template. Ensure the template exists.
menu.kanbanAlertDesc: This menu renders a standalone board configuration, shares CRUD with the dynamic grid, and supports timeline/report views.
menu.dynamicLinkAlertDesc: This menu navigates to a computed link. The destination can vary by runtime context.
menu.systemUserDualConfigDesc: Default field/trigger settings above apply to main users. The section below applies to sub-users when admin opens /system/user.
menu.systemUserMainConfigTitle: Main user configuration uses the standard editor
menu.systemUserMainConfigDesc: Main account data table, field config, and trigger are edited directly in this menu's Table/Trigger sections.
menu.parentMenuHint: Choose a parent menu to organize hierarchy
menu.iconHint: Icon name from Ant Design Icons
menu.dataScopeHint: Applies to this entire menu/table and cannot exceed the user's base data permissions.
menu.tablePagesizeHint: Number of rows displayed per page
menu.vLinkFallbackHint: Legacy compatibility field; prefer using the Dynamic Link URL field below.
menu.vLinkComponentHint: Vue components are no longer used; this field is kept for backward compatibility.
menu.autoCodeTemplateHint: Select p_name from sys_autos (p_type=0) for dynamic code execution
menu.dynamicLinkUrlPlaceholder: Enter URL or expression for dynamic link
menu.dynamicLinkUrlHint: URL is computed dynamically from menu context
menu.rowTypeEditHint: How rows are edited in grid
menu.crmConfigHint: Provide JSON for pipeline stages, inventory, activities, analytics KPIs, and customer data protection rules.

aiDesigner.selectAppFirst: Please select an app before using AI.
aiDesigner.autoAnalyzeTitle: AI automatically designs the full menu by business flow
aiDesigner.autoAnalyzeDesc: AI will analyze the requirement and automatically choose menu type per feature for the whole menu tree.
aiDesigner.singleInputPlaceholder: Enter full business requirements so AI can automatically design the complete app menu...
aiDesigner.hasStoredRequestDesc: If you add more input, the system will combine it with the previous requirement so AI understands better.
aiDesigner.reviewBeforeApply: Review the JSON below before applying.
aiDesigner.resultPlaceholder: AI output will be shown here (JSON format)
aiDesigner.refineHintTitle: You can ask AI for further changes
aiDesigner.refineHintDesc: Enter your requested changes. AI will reuse the generated result and re-analyze the full menu based on business requirements.
aiDesigner.refinePlaceholder: Example: Add a monthly revenue report menu, convert Orders into Master-Detail with payment history tab...
aiDesigner.emptyMenu: AI did not return any menu list
aiDesigner.persistWarning: AI generated the result, but failed to save request history.

context.maxFiles: You can attach up to {{max}} JSON files.
context.jsonOnly: Only .json files are accepted to ensure correct structure parsing.
context.attachedMessage: Attached {{count}} JSON context file(s) for app_id {{appId}}

generateMode.label: Generation mode:
generateMode.diffHint: Only update changed parts, keep app_id continuity
generateMode.diffNeedPrevious: Diff mode requires previous AI output. The system will switch to full mode.
generateMode.diffNeedInput: Please enter change details in diff mode.

progress.autoRefining: First AI result is not good enough. Auto-refining and regenerating...
progress.autoRefineResult: First result quality is insufficient, auto-refine is running.

progressStatus.running: AI is updating menu in realtime

sampleMenu.sectionLabelEmpty: Sample menu reference (optional) — choose an app for AI to learn or adapt
sampleMenu.sectionLabelLoadedBase: Sample menu ✓ [Use as base] — {{count}} menu(s) from {{app}}
sampleMenu.pickAppTitle: Choose an app to auto-load sample menu
sampleMenu.pickAppDesc: Choose an app to load sample menus. Reference mode: AI learns the structure and designs a new menu. Base mode: AI uses this menu as the base and adapts it to the new customer request.
sampleMenu.modeBaseDesc: AI uses this menu as base and adapts to customer requirements
sampleMenu.modeReferenceDesc: AI designs a new menu while using this sample as guidance
sampleMenu.loadNotFound: No sample menu found in app {{appId}}.
sampleMenu.loadSuccess: Loaded {{count}} base menu(s) from app {{appId}} for AI reference.
sampleMenu.loadFailed: Cannot load sample menu from app {{appId}}: {{error}}
sampleMenu.refineInfoBase: Sample menu from {{app}} is included in refinement prompt (base mode: AI continues editing on that menu)
sampleMenu.refineInfoReference: Sample menu from {{app}} is included in refinement prompt (reference mode)

operationScenario.label: Select operation scenario:
operationScenario.newBuildDesc: AI analyzes the business description and designs the entire menu tree
operationScenario.incrementalDesc: Add/edit/delete a few modules — AI returns the FULL updated tree
operationScenario.propertyDesc: Select exactly one menu node, AI changes only the requested fields

incremental.alertTitle: Scenario 2: Incremental update — AI returns the FULL menu tree
incremental.requestPlaceholder: Example: Add an HR module with Employee List, Payroll, Attendance. Convert Revenue Report to Master-Detail. Delete the test module...
incremental.enterRequest: Please enter the requested change description
incremental.noBaseMenu: There is no current menu to update. Use the New Build scenario first.
incremental.abnormalDeleteStopped: Abnormal AI deletion detected ({{deleted}}/{{total}} nodes). The job was stopped to protect the base menu.
incremental.guardBlocked: AI result blocked by safety guard: deleted {{deleted}}/{{total}} nodes (over incremental threshold).
incremental.scopeBlocked: Automatically skipped {{count}} change(s) outside the requested scope.

property.alertTitle: Scenario 3: Edit properties of one menu node
property.alertDesc: Choose a menu from the list, its JSON appears in the editor below and can be edited manually. Enter a request and AI changes only the specified fields.
property.selectNodeRequired: Please select the menu node to edit
property.noMenu: No menu is available. Create menus first.
property.nodeJsonLabel: Node JSON (can be edited manually before sending to AI):
property.nodeJsonPlaceholder: The menu node JSON will appear here
property.requestPlaceholder: Example: Change the icon to UserOutlined, add the email field to table, update trigger.before_save to validate required...
property.enterRequest: Please enter the edit request for this node
property.nodeNotFound: Node data was not found. Please select it again.
property.invalidNode: AI did not return a valid menu node
property.mergeComputed: Jackson merged the node and computed precise field-level diffs
property.editSuccess: AI finished editing the node. Review the result below, then apply.
property.applySuccess: Applied the node edit to the system
property.editableResultHint: The node has been updated — the JSON in the editor can still be adjusted before Apply

editor.livePatchHintOn: AI can apply line-by-line or multi-line edits directly in the editor while running
editor.livePatchHintOff: AI updates the editor only after completion
editor.liveUpdateMessage: AI is updating the editor directly: {{count}} line(s) changed
editor.liveUpdateDescription: Changed lines are highlighted in realtime directly inside the editor.
editor.editablePlaceholder: AI output will be shown here. You can edit JSON before applying.
editor.stoppedTitle: AI was stopped to protect menu

applyGuard.notReady: AI coverage gate: requirements not met for apply

coverage.summary: Coverage: modules={{modules}}, tables={{tables}}, unresolved={{unresolved}} | gate={{mode}} | score={{score}}/{{minScore}}

requestStore.hasData: Stored AI request data exists for app_id: {{appId}}
requestStore.noData: No stored AI request data for app_id: {{appId}}
requestStore.noDataDesc: You can run a fresh AI generation without being affected by previous stored request data.
requestStore.deleteConfirm: Delete stored AI request data for this app?
requestStore.deleteSuccess: Stored AI request data has been deleted for the current app.
requestStore.deleteFailed: Failed to delete stored AI request data.

editorSeed.sample: Sample program JSON has been loaded into the editor
editorSeed.current: Current menu JSON has been loaded into the editor

mergePreview.title: Precise Copilot-style change preview
mergePreview.inlineInEditor: Change details are shown directly inside csm-editor
mergePreview.reviewHint: Review using the Keep/Undo bar above or line-by-line in the list below.
mergePreview.warnNoDraftUndo: No AI draft available to undo
mergePreview.warnOriginalNodeNotFound: Original node was not found for undo
mergePreview.warnInvalidDraftUndo: Current draft is not valid JSON, undo failed
mergePreview.infoLineNotFound: Cannot find this node line in the current editor content.
mergePreview.warnInvalidDraftRestoreBulk: Current draft is not valid JSON, bulk restore failed

developer.selectOrCreateFirst: Please select or create a code item first
developer.selectToDelete: Please select a code item to delete
developer.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?

ai.safetyDesc: AI only suggests code. Your current add/edit/delete flow remains unchanged until you click Apply.
ai.saveBoundary: Saving or deleting here updates the live code used by the system immediately. Please review carefully before proceeding.
ai.promptPlaceholder: Describe exactly what you want AI to change/add in this code...
ai.selectRangeFirst: Please select a code range before applying
ai.appliedReplace: Applied AI code by replace mode
ai.appliedAppend: Applied AI code by append mode
ai.appliedSelection: Applied AI code to selected range

broadcast.title: Send Broadcast Notification to AppId
broadcast.message_placeholder:
Enter your notification message here...

Example:
🔧 System maintenance scheduled from 2AM-4AM on Jan 24. Please save your work!

or

🎉 New feature: Excel report export has been updated!
broadcast.success: ✅ Notification sent to all users in {{appId}}
broadcast.select_app_required: Please select an app to send notification
broadcast.admin_only: ⛔ Only CSM administrators can send broadcast notifications.
broadcast.note_all_users: Notification will be sent to ALL users currently logged into the selected app
broadcast.note_one_way: This is a one-way message - users cannot reply
broadcast.note_persistent: Notification will be saved to database and displayed in chat history
broadcast.note_realtime: Users receive notification in realtime if they are online

dev_chat.title: Private Dev - Admin Chat
dev_chat.desc: Online admins in the current app are listed below. Select one admin for realtime direct chat with long-term history.
